3208020.name: INFOCUS
3208020.description:
Step into the world of H.E.L.I.O.S, a drone flight simulator designed for both enthusiasts and professionals. Each flight mode has been carefully crafted to realistically replicate the behavior of a real drone, offering a rich, authentic experience suitable for all skill levels.

Air Mode: Perfect for those seeking dynamic control. This mode allows the drone to maintain maneuverability even during free fall, making it ideal for performing tricks and enjoying a more immersive flight experience.

Velocity Mode (Position Hold): Ideal for beginners, this mode helps the drone hold its position against the wind by simplifying the controls. Just point in a direction, and the drone will go. It's the most accessible mode, focused on stability and ease of use.

Angle Mode: Offers precise control over the drone’s tilt, combining maneuverability with stability. Great for pilots who want smooth navigation with some assistance.

Acro Mode: Provides full freedom over the drone’s orientation, allowing for complex maneuvers and stunts. This mode is aimed at experienced users looking for a challenge and high-adrenaline flying.

Cine Mode: Designed for video capture, this mode softens controls and stabilizes the camera, reducing sudden movements. Perfect for smooth and professional-looking footage.

🔜 A multiplayer mode is coming soon, allowing pilots to compete or collaborate in real time. Get ready to experience drone flying like never before!

Take flight with H.E.L.I.O.S – The Ultimate Drone Simulator
3208020.supported_languages:
法语*, 英语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
